And I were vacationing in Costa Rica, on
a surf trip with our families. And Scott
turned to me, we were walking off the
beach one day and just said, "How come
nobody does conference here? Why do we
got to go to Omaha and go to the
Courtyard Marriott to do that?" And I
know Scott well enough to know that if I
throw down a gauntlet, he'll usually
accept the challenge. And I'm like,
"Well, dude, why don't you do it?"
>> I think this may [music] have ruined
other conferences for me in the future.
The connections you build are genuine.
You're a group that's stuck together for
a little [music] less than a week.
You're eating dinner, you you know, and
conversations go from life to business.
And then you learn something new, you
know, surfing.
